initMessage:
```Hello, You can talk to the tutors for {subject} here.```
All tutors will be notified **once staff approves of your enquiry.**
# Make sure to **not share contact info in any way** 
As this is against the <#1437161364568277013>. 
(Examples include: Emails, Phone numbers, Discord IDs, etc. ) 
-# You may ask your questions regarding the tutors plans, or any other questions. 
Be careful with your first message as **only your first message will reach the tutors.** 
-# You may continue to talk uninterrupted once staff approves of your enquiry.

sticky.title: Looking for *your* subject tutor in *this* crowd?
sticky.body:
Try smashing that search icon, and type *only* your subject name.
And you're gonna get all the available tutors for that subject. For all levels.

messages.text:
Dear Application Team, 

I'm an experienced tutor offering help in math and science for middle school, high school, and university students.

About me:
• IB Graduate 
• 6 years of tutoring experience
• 3rd-year Biomedical Sciences student
• Experienced in working with students from many levels, from test preparation to general building of fundamentals

I focus on explaining concepts in a clear manner to students, helping them actually understand the material as opposed to memorizing. As well as this, I keep up with them and am open to help outside of sessions. I've helped students significantly improve their grades (very often from 60s to 90s). 

My subjects are: 

• Mathematics
-Middle School
-AP / IB SL& HL
-Calculus I, II, & III
-Statistics I & II

• Chemistry
-Middle School
-AP / IB SL & HL
-General Chemistry I & II
-Organic Chemistry I & II
-Biochemistry I & II

• Biology
-Middle School
-AP / IB SL & HL
-General Biology I & II
-Cell Biology I & II 
-Molecular Biology
-Genetics, etc.

• Physics 
-Middle School
-AP & IB SL/HL
-General Physics I & II
-Medical Physics I & II
-Biophysics I & II

I would love to help contribute to Tutorshelp!

Im assuming you will be teaching A levels too? since you are teaching IB.

Hi, yeah! I've taught A levels before since IB is pretty similar (though more advanced); same as AP. 

Oh and, for IB, the HL version of a subject covers everything in the SL version + more - so taking HL means you can teach both. 

I'll get back to you guys with the form, I appreciate all the communication!
Alright that sounds very amazing, really looking forward to having you as a tutor here. Hopefully we can connect you with some amazing students soon!

Hey! Just filling out the form, but there are a few things I can't provide within it as context. 

The grades in the IBDP I attached are good (not great, not bad) - They significantly improved during university; I can supply those transcripts if you'd like. 

Another thing includes the courses taught, which are largely from the knowledge I've amassed during university (I didn't take Physics in IB, for example, but I did in university and tutored IB Physics HL as well as the mentioned physics courses in my introduction statement)

Also, I added only IB Biology as my course because of how the form is designed, but as you know, I'm perfectly open and able to tutor other courses.

Lastly, the video might be hard to get as I never record tutoring sessions for reasons of privacy (for the student). I'll probably have to record it myself, but if there's anything I can send in aside from a recording I would appreciate it haha.

Thank you for your time in reading this though!
